page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The CPU configuration provides 128 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyper-threading.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high resource density of the ecs.g7.32xlarge make it suitable for enterprise workloads requiring predictable compute performance. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, database hosting, and CI/CD pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory. Powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, the instance provides 128 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute allocation. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core, this instance is designed for enterprise applications, database hosting, and general-purpose workloads requiring high-throughput network performance and predictable compute resources.
